findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Italic emphasis completely removed from two referenced document titles
findings.evidence: In the PDF, 'Draft Cape Fear River Water Supply Evaluation' and 'Draft Jordan Lake Water Supply Allocation Recommendations' are rendered in italics to distinguish them as document titles. In the HTML, both titles appear as plain (non-italic) text within quotation marks, losing all emphasis.

findings.description: Two 'here' hyperlinks from the PDF (linking to maps for the Pittsboro and Wilmington meeting locations) are rendered as plain text in the HTML, losing the href.
findings.evidence: PDF: 'A map of the location for this meeting is available here.' (with 'here' as a clickable link) appears twice — once for the Chatham Community Library meeting and once for the New Hanover County Government Center meeting. HTML: both instances render 'here' as plain text with no <a> tag.
